message: Include rows must have an auditable source_url.
Startup names should not duplicate after normalization.
Investor names should not duplicate after normalization.
Canonical investment edges must point to canonical investor ids.
Canonical investment edges must resolve to master startups, aliases, or tracked external canonical startup nodes.
Canonical investment edges pointing to startup nodes outside the master dataset; review as expansion candidates or keep as capital-network context.
Include rows should have structured_country for regional coverage analysis.
Include rows should be moved from fragile/taxonomy_stub to source-backed seeded or reviewed.
Source registry should contain tier 1 official sources.
